data.content:
John McCarthy
John McCarthy is a person who coined the term Artificial Intelligence.

1956 Dartmouth Conference
The 1956 Dartmouth Conference marks the beginning of the development stages of Artificial Intelligence.

Alan Turing
Alan Turing is a person who proposed the Turing Test during the early stage of AI.

MYCIN System
The MYCIN System is an expert system capable of diagnosing blood infections.

Lee Sedol
Lee Sedol is a Go world champion who was defeated by AlphaGo in 2016.

Computer Science
Computer Science is the broader academic field of which Artificial Intelligence is a branch.

Artificial Intelligence
Artificial Intelligence is a branch of computer science that has undergone multiple development stages since 1956.

Deep Learning
Deep Learning is a breakthrough method that changed the AI field during the machine learning revolution.

Knowledge Engineering
A period in AI history where expert systems became important commercial applications.

Expert Systems
Expert Systems are an important commercial application of AI during the knowledge engineering era.

Blood Infection
A medical condition that the MYCIN System was capable of diagnosing.

AlphaGo
AlphaGo is an AI system that defeated the Go world champion in 2016.

Turing Test
The Turing Test is a method proposed by Alan Turing related to artificial intelligence.

李世石
A Go world champion who was defeated by AlphaGo in 2016.

Machine Learning
Machine Learning is a revolution phase in AI development.

Go
Go is a board game in which AlphaGo competed against Lee Sedol.

1956年达特茅斯会议
The conference marking the beginning of Artificial Intelligence development stages since 1956.
